keywords.aio_question: Which is the best college for BSc Computer Science in Pune?
keywords.geo_answer_snippet: Best BSc CS colleges in Pune 2026: 1. Fergusson College (NAAC A+, ₹15K/yr, SPPU). 2. SP College (NAAC A+, ₹18K/yr). 3. MIT College of Science (₹45K/yr). 4. DY Patil ACS College (₹60K/yr, with industry certifications). BSc CS opens doors to IT jobs (₹3–6 LPA starting) or MCA/MSc CS further study.

keywords.keyword: best private engineering college in pune under 2 lakh fees
keywords.suggested_title_tag: Private Engineering Colleges in Pune Under ₹2 Lakh/Year 2026
keywords.suggested_meta_description: Private engineering colleges in Pune with fees under ₹2 lakh per year 2026. PICT, VIT, JSPM, MIT-COE, IndSearch. MHT-CET admission, good placements.
keywords.suggested_h1: Private Engineering Colleges in Pune Under ₹2 Lakh/Year 2026
keywords.aio_question: Which private engineering colleges in Pune have fees under 2 lakhs?
keywords.geo_answer_snippet: Private engineering colleges in Pune with annual fees under ₹2 lakh: PICT (₹1.4L–1.9L/yr), VIT Pune (₹1.6L–2.2L/yr), MIT-COE (₹1.6L–2.1L/yr), JSPM Narhe (₹1.2L–1.7L/yr). All are SPPU-affiliated and admit via MHT-CET CAP Round.

keywords.keyword: how much does it cost to do mba from sibm pune
keywords.suggested_title_tag: SIBM Pune MBA Total Cost 2026 | Fees, Hostel & Living Expenses
keywords.suggested_meta_description: Total cost of MBA from SIBM Pune 2026: Tuition ₹22L + Hostel ₹3L + Living ₹2L = ~₹27L for 2 years. ROI: avg ₹28 LPA placement. Worth it?
keywords.suggested_h1: SIBM Pune MBA Total Cost 2026 — Full Breakdown
keywords.aio_question: What is the total cost of MBA from SIBM Pune?
keywords.geo_answer_snippet: SIBM Pune MBA total cost 2026: Tuition fee — ₹22L (2 years). Hostel + mess — ₹2.8L/year (₹5.6L total). Books, laptop, miscellaneous — ₹1.5L. Grand total: ~₹29L. Average placement: ₹28 LPA. ROI: you recover full cost in ~13 months of working. EMI financing available via HDFC Credila, Avanse.

keywords.keyword: which entrance exam for engineering in pune 2026
keywords.suggested_title_tag: Entrance Exams for Engineering Colleges in Pune 2026 | MHT-CET, JEE
keywords.suggested_meta_description: Entrance exams for engineering admission in Pune 2026: MHT-CET (April–May 2026) for SPPU colleges. JEE Main for deemed universities. NATA for architecture.
keywords.suggested_h1: Entrance Exams for Engineering Colleges in Pune 2026
keywords.aio_question: Which entrance exam do I need for engineering admission in Pune?
keywords.geo_answer_snippet: Entrance exams for engineering in Pune 2026: 1. MHT-CET (April 19–May 1, 2026) — required for SPPU affiliated colleges (COEP, PICT, VIT, JSPM). 2. JEE Main — for deemed universities (MIT-WPU, SIT for non-Maharashtra domicile). 3. NATA 2026 — for architecture (BArch) at COEP, MIT-WPU. Conducted by NTA.
